observation.summary: Four secondary README pages remained reader-authored while doc-map and repo verification entrypoints were generated.

hypothesis.summary: A small README page manifest can make repository handoff knowledge executable without changing daemon runtime behavior.

execution.summary: Generate README handoff markdown from page fragments and source checks that anchor CLI, provider, installer, and task-source facts.

evaluation.summary: The verifier rejects generated doc drift, missing source anchors, missing page fragments, and missing public CI evidence upload.

retrospective.summary: README support pages become generated evidence surfaces, leaving migration history and roadmap as explicit manual debt.

evidence.proves: README handoff docs are generated and source anchors remain present
public CI uploads README handoff evidence
